examples: He said it takes courage to get his trucks from the port to Bangui.
Dr Serdouma heads the 144-bed maternity ward at the Bangui community hospital.
Damara is the first major city on the road heading north from Bangui, 75 km away.
The rebels over-ran Bangui last weekend, in a move condemned by the United States as "illegitimate".
President Francois Bozize himself fled to Cameroon when the rebels captured the capital, Bangui.
